AI / Business Insight

Review summary

What changed?

Net revenue is up 17.3% compared to the previous period.

Why it matters

Growth is driven by stronger product sales and higher collections.

Risks detected

Outstanding balance is increasing, while 12 high-value products are at stock risk.

Recommended actions

Focus on collections, replenish fast-moving items, and review operating expenses.

Recommended Actions

Collect Outstanding

7,320,000 outstanding balance requires follow-up.

Replenish Stock

12 high-revenue products are low or out of stock.

Review Expenses

Expenses are up 8.7% versus the previous period.

Close Open Sessions

3 open sessions have cash variance.
